summary: Privacy policy page displays correct structure and content with proper legal formatting, but uses gray background instead of required diner teal palette

violations.description: Page uses neutral gray background instead of required diner teal #9fd8d2 for public pages. Legal pages should use cream #fff8ea canvas per manifesto.
Background color does not match the mandated diner teal #9fd8d2 for public marketing route pages or cream #fff8ea for legal content

actions: Update page background to use cream #fff8ea as specified for legal longform content per M.density.2 and M.universal.1
Ensure legal article card uses proper diner palette instead of neutral gray UI defaults
